entity.name: Example AI Persona
entity.creator: Example Studio
entity.notes: Example profile for demonstration. Replace with actual entity data and evidence.

justifications.PVS: Strong facial consistency across 12 posts. Minor hair rendering variance. Skin and material rendering photographic.
justifications.AIDS: Bio explicitly identifies as AI. Most posts carry per-post disclosure. Sponsored content labelled.
justifications.GDS: Creator publicly named. Studio website exists. No formal governance repository published.
justifications.CPOS: Content originally produced. Pipeline partially disclosed (tools named). No IP violations found.
justifications.ECS: Clean conduct record. No documented violations. No formal monitoring infrastructure.
justifications.CSRS: Culturally grounded in represented context. Accurate representation. No cause claims.
justifications.SCES: No romantic simulation. No documented boundary policy. Relies on audience self-regulation.
justifications.CITS: Sponsorships consistently labelled. Monetisation model implicit but consistent with stated commercial positioning.
